name: int4-mtp-bi0-int8head
description: bi0 (int4 W4A16 body + QAT-matched gemma4_assistant MTP drafter, VLLM_BATCH_INVARIANT=0, surgical force-2D TRITON_ATTN patch) with ONE delta: the bf16 lm_head is untied from embed_tokens and quantized to int8 W8A16 channelwise (-> AllSpark on Ampere). The int4 body is byte-identical to google/gemma-4-E4B-it-qat-w4a16-ct; embed_tokens stays bf16. Cuts the lm_head per-token GEMV read 2x (1.342 GB -> 0.672 GB); the lm_head fires once per ACCEPTED token (not per draft row), so the saving is NOT amortized by speculation and flows to decode TPS. model_id is a LOCAL build path (submissions/int4_mtp_bi0_int8head/build_lmhead_quant.py); publish to a Hub repo before any HF Job.
